# phare_project (Resource)

Manages a Phare project. Projects are used to organize and group monitoring resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "phare_users" "team" {
  emails = ["nicolas@phare.io"]
}

resource "phare_project" "test" {
  name    = "Terraform"
  members = data.phare_users.team.users[*].id

  settings = {
    use_incident_ai              = true
    use_incident_merging         = true
    incident_merging_time_window = 30
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `members` (List of Number) List of team member IDs (1-100 members)
- `name` (String) Project name (1-25 characters)

### Optional

- `created_at` (String) Date of creation
- `id` (Number) Project ID
- `settings` (Attributes) Project settings (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))
- `slug` (String) Project slug (auto-generated from name)
- `updated_at` (String) Date of last update

<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Optional:

- `incident_merging_time_window` (Number) Time window for incident merging in minutes (5, 10, 30, 60, 120, or 180). Defaults to 60.
- `use_incident_ai` (Boolean) Whether to generate AI summaries for incidents. Defaults to true.
- `use_incident_merging` (Boolean) Whether to use incident merging. Defaults to true.
